title: Parish health units to act in harmony with state health officer
doc_html:
§16. Parish health units to act in harmony with state health officer

           All parish health units act under the supervision and advice of the state health officer and the office of health services and environmental quality of the Louisiana Department of Health.

           Acts 1976, No. 346, §1. Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §5, eff. July 17, 1978.
doc_text:
§16.  Parish health units to act in harmony with state health officer
All parish health units act under the supervision and advice of the state
health officer and the office of health services and environmental quality of the
Louisiana Department of Health.
Acts 1976, No. 346, §1.  Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §5, eff. July
17, 1978.
